languages.text: "К истреблению врагов человечества. Ксенос, мутант и еретик должны пасть — только тогда Империум воспрянет".
"To exterminate the enemies of Humanity. Xenos, mutant, and heretic must fall — only then will the Imperium rise."
languages.original_text: "К истреблению врагов человечества. Ксенос, мутант и еретик должны пасть — только тогда Империум воспрянет".

traits.locale_text: "To exterminate the enemies of Humanity. Xenos, mutant, and heretic must fall — only then will the Imperium rise."
"To win the war. Xenos, mutant, and heretic must fall — only then will the Imperium rise."
"To win the war. Xenos, mutant, and heretic must fall — only then will the Imperium rise."
"To exterminate the enemies of Humanity. Xenos, mutant, and heretic must fall — only then will the Imperium rise."

languages.text: 「戦争に勝利するため。異種族、変異種、異端者は倒さなければいけない。そうしなければ帝国は立ち上がれない」
languages.original_text: "To win the war. Xenos, mutant, and heretic must fall — only then will the Imperium rise."

traits.locale_text: 「戦争に勝利するため。異種族、変異種、異端者は倒さなければいけない。そうしなければ帝国は立ち上がれない。」

languages.text: “为了消灭人类之敌。异形、变种人与异端必须尽数诛灭。只有这样，帝国才能崛起。”
languages.original_text: "To exterminate the enemies of Humanity. Xenos, mutant, and heretic must fall — only then will the Imperium rise."

traits.locale_text: “为了消灭人类之敌。异形、变种人与异端必须尽数诛灭。只有这样，帝国才能崛起。”

languages.text: «Exterminar a los enemigos de la Humanidad. Los xenos, mutantes y herejes deben caer: solo entonces se alzará el Imperium».
languages.original_text: "To exterminate the enemies of Humanity. Xenos, mutant, and heretic must fall — only then will the Imperium rise."

traits.locale_text: «Exterminar a los enemigos de la Humanidad. Los xenos, mutantes y herejes deben caer: solo entonces se alzará el Imperium».

languages.text: "Um die Feinde der Menschheit auszulöschen. Xenos, Mutanten und Ketzer müssen fallen ... erst dann wird das Imperium erblühen."
languages.original_text: "To exterminate the enemies of Humanity. Xenos, mutant, and heretic must fall — only then will the Imperium rise."

traits.locale_text: "Um die Feinde der Menschheit auszulöschen. Xenos, Mutanten und Ketzer müssen fallen ... erst dann wird das Imperium erblühen."

languages.text: « Pour exterminer les ennemis de l'humanité. Xénos, mutants et hérétiques doivent être anéantis ; ce n'est qu'alors que l'Imperium atteindra son apogée. »
languages.original_text: "To exterminate the enemies of Humanity. Xenos, mutant, and heretic must fall — only then will the Imperium rise."

traits.locale_text: « Pour exterminer les ennemis de l'humanité. Xénos, mutants et hérétiques doivent être anéantis ; ce n'est qu'alors que l'Imperium atteindra son apogée. »

languages.text: "İnsanlığın düşmanlarını yok etmek için. Zeno, mutant ve kâfir olanlar yenilmeli. Ancak o zaman İmparatorluk yükselebilir."
languages.original_text: "To exterminate the enemies of Humanity. Xenos, mutant, and heretic must fall — only then will the Imperium rise."

traits.locale_text: "İnsanlığın düşmanlarını yok etmek için. Zeno, mutant ve kâfir olanlar yenilmeli. Ancak o zaman İmparatorluk yükselebilir."
